articles.title: U.S. AND IRAN AGREE TO 2-WEEK CEASEFIRE - Axios
articles.summary: The United States and Iran have agreed to a two-week ceasefire that was announced hours before a deadline for massive strikes. This period will be used to negotiate a larger agreement to potentially end the war. Peace talks between the two nations are expected to begin this Friday in Islamabad.
articles.description: The announcement came hours before Trump's deadline to launch massive strikes.
articles.author: Dave Lawler, Barak Ravid
